name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Can I count on you, Friend?
body:
We have a goal of activating 500 donors by June 15th. Friend, can I count on you? | |

---
---
|
Dear Friend,

I need your help.

**Our campaign has set a goal of activating 500 donors to my presidential campaign by June 15th. Can I count on your support?**

[**Follow this link to chip in whatever you can afford to give right now**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28350589:27218017123:m:1:877327319:49983AC18F1A64124AFFCC86B93A3531:r).

**For me to have a chance in what is sure to be a hard fought Republican primary and general election contest, my campaign must have strong, solid backing from voters all across America.**

That's why I am reaching out to you right now. Friend, I'm ready to be Commander in Chief on Day One, but I cannot win this race unless I have your support.

**[Will you please help us reach our goal of activating 500 donors by Monday, June 15th?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28350589:27218017123:m:1:877327319:49983AC18F1A64124AFFCC86B93A3531:r)**

I know the road ahead will not be easy, but I take comfort in knowing I have your support.

Sincerely,

Lindsey Graham

P.S. **500 donors by June 15th**... **we can only reach this goal if we have your immediate support today.** **[Please become a donor to my presidential campaign by making a secure online donation of any amount!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28350589:27218017123:m:1:877327319:49983AC18F1A64124AFFCC86B93A3531:r)** Thanks so much.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28350589:27218017123:m:1:877327319:49983AC18F1A64124AFFCC86B93A3531:r) |

| Paid for by Lindsey Graham 2016

---

name: Governor Scott Walker
subject: Get Your Copy of Unintimidated
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our American Revival
body:
_****_
****
****
[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjI4MjAxMDAS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTgxMDMzMDA1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjI4MjAxMDAS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTgxMDMzMDA1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Peter,

It's time leaders in Washington take a cue from what we've been able to accomplish in the states.

In Wisconsin, we took on the Big Government Labor Bosses to put in place conservative reforms that have turned our state around -- creating jobs, unleashing opportunity and restoring hope to Wisconsin. If we can do it in Wisconsin, we can do it in states across the country.

I wrote my book, "Unintimidated" to help conservatives on the national stage learn from our success, and I'd like for you to have a copy. Unintimidated shares the story of our fight to save Wisconsin from a $3.6 billion budget deficit while simultaneously improving the state's schools and public infrastructure.
[
You can secure your copy with a contribution of $60 or more.](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjI4MjAxMDAS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTgxMDMzMDA1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

[Your generous contribution today will support our fight for conservative reforms and help us restore power to the American taxpayer.](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjI4MjAxMDAS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTgxMDMzMDA1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

I'm excited to share this with you, so I hope you'll take advantage of this special offer today.

Thanks,

Governor Scott Walker

[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjI4MjAxMDAS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTgxMDMzMDA1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

**
**

Paid for by Our American Revival

This message reflects the opinions and representations of Our American Revival. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Our American Revival's online community. If you would prefer not to receive future emails from Our American Revival, click [here](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=22820100&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTgxMDMzMDA1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: randhpaulmd@gmail.com
subject: What are they hiding, Fellow Conservative?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

To me it's common sense: Members of Congress should actually read the bills before voting on them.

But in Washington, common sense is often flipped upside down on its head.

And the latest example is the 800-page Trans-Pacific Partnership (TPP) - President Barack Obama's secretive trade deal.

The deal's text is kept hidden in a secret room within the U.S. Capitol, unavailable to the American public.

I'm demanding Barack Obama release the final text of the trade deal IMMEDIATELY before final passage is voted on by Congress.

**[So please sign your"Read the Bills" petition urging members of Congress to demand the White House make the text of the secretive treaty available to the public before being voted on by Congress](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28359451:27229813898:m:1:879035888:D894A5D51B0BBA9A663ABE6AB0C3F75E:r)**.

Currently, only members of Congress - and select staff - are allowed to read the deal's text. But we're not allowed to discuss or talk about the contents of the deal outside of the secret room.

And even though most of my colleagues in the Senate admitted they haven't read the text of the bill, many of them recently voted to fast-track it through the Senate.

Fellow Conservative, I've got concerns about voting on any bill that's kept in secret and hidden from the American people.

**[That's why I'm counting on you to sign your"Read the Bills" petition immediately](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28359451:27229813898:m:1:879035888:D894A5D51B0BBA9A663ABE6AB0C3F75E:r)**.

Unfortunately, this secretive deal highlights a problem that is all too common in Washington nowadays . . .

The bills are thousands of pages long, and they're often plopped on our desks a few hours before the vote takes place.

So no one actually reads them.

In fact, about a year ago, a 1,000-page was bill plopped on my desk with only TWO HOURS to read it before the vote took place.

Current Senate rules currently require 48 hours before voting on legislation.

But when I objected on the grounds of having only two hours to read 1,000 pages, my colleagues simply changed the rule and held the vote despite my objections.

And I'm sure you remember former House Speaker Nancy Pelosi famously stating, "We have to pass the bill [ObamaCare] so that you can find out what's in it."

I believe the American people deserve better.

That's why I've introduced the "Read the Bills Act" in the U.S. Senate.

If passed, my legislation would FORCE members of Congress to actually read the bills they vote on to stop the backroom deals where thousand page bills are rammed into law before anyone knows what's in them.

In fact, my bill requires the Senate to wait one day before a vote is held for every 20 pages of legislation.

That means 800-page legislation, like Obama's secret trade deal, would have to be made public 40 days before the vote takes place - giving Senators adequate time to actually read it.

**[If you believe members of Congress should read the bills before voting on them, please sign your"Read the Bills" petition immediately](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28359451:27229813898:m:1:879035888:D894A5D51B0BBA9A663ABE6AB0C3F75E:r)**.

Fellow Conservative, I'm the only Senator demanding the White House release the text of the trade bill.

And I'm counting on you to help provide the grassroots muscle to force the White House to publicly release the text of Obama's secret trade deal before the final votes take place.

So please sign your "Read the Bills" petition right away.

And after you sign, can I count on you to **[chip in $20.16](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28359451:27229813898:m:1:879035888:D894A5D51B0BBA9A663ABE6AB0C3F75E:r)** to help me rally the American people to demand Congress actually read the bills before voting on them?

Thank you in advance for your support.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28359452:27229813898:m:1:879035888:D894A5D51B0BBA9A663ABE6AB0C3F75E:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28359453:27229813898:m:1:879035888:D894A5D51B0BBA9A663ABE6AB0C3F75E:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28359454:27229813898:m:1:879035888:D894A5D51B0BBA9A663ABE6AB0C3F75E:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28359455:27229813898:m:1:879035888:D894A5D51B0BBA9A663ABE6AB0C3F75E:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28359451:27229813898:m:1:879035888:D894A5D51B0BBA9A663ABE6AB0C3F75E:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28359456:27229813898:m:1:879035888:D894A5D51B0BBA9A663ABE6AB0C3F75E:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28359457:27229813898:m:1:879035888:D894A5D51B0BBA9A663ABE6AB0C3F75E:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28359458:27229813898:m:1:879035888:D894A5D51B0BBA9A663ABE6AB0C3F75E:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Christian Ferry, Campaign Manager, Lindsey Graham 2016
subject: ALERT: What the White House just said...
body:
It's time to start imagining an Obama-free White House. | |

---
---
|
_**"It's hard for me to imagine both a Graham White House and what a Graham White House would be without a first lady."**_
\- Josh Earnest, White House Press Secretary
Thursday, June 11, 2015
Friend, you read that correctly. **Those were the exact words from the White House Press Secretary today.**

Instead of focusing on the critical issues facing our nation like national security and foreign policy, the Obama Administration is focusing elsewhere, and now **they've set their sights on taking down Senator Graham's campaign**.

**Friend, let's imagine a White House without Barack Obama**. A White House without a president who leads from behind, who doesn't stand up for our allies, who doesn't listen to his military commanders.

Now let's imagine a White House with a Commander-in-Chief ready on day one, where our president is respected by our allies and feared by our enemies. **That is what a Lindsey Graham White House will look like**.

**It's time to start imagining an Obama-free White House and that begins when Senator Graham becomes president.

[But he can only get there if we have YOUR immediate support. Won't you please follow this link to support our campaign by making an instant online contribution?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28360959:27231485560:m:1:877327319:7512BEC8ABB4AF4514E4ABD3DB596A33:r)**

The Obama Administration would rather point fingers than discuss their own failed policies and it is time to put an end to it. **If you are sick and tired of the Obama Administration's smoke screen tactics, then we need your help right now.**

**[Please stand with Senator Graham by making an immediate donation to our campaign today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28360959:27231485560:m:1:877327319:7512BEC8ABB4AF4514E4ABD3DB596A33:r)**.

Sincerely,

Christian Ferry
Campaign Manager
Lindsey Graham 2016

P.S. The Obama Administration loves to distract from the real problems at hand. We have suffered 6 years under Obama's direction and it is time to begin imagining an Obama-free White House. **[If you stand with Lindsey then follow this link to make an immediate contribution.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28360959:27231485560:m:1:877327319:7512BEC8ABB4AF4514E4ABD3DB596A33:r)**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28360959:27231485560:m:1:877327319:7512BEC8ABB4AF4514E4ABD3DB596A33:r) |

| Paid for by Lindsey Graham 2016

---

name: Dennis Cheng, Hillary for America
subject: We've only got one shot
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Help Hillary launch this campaign. |

Hi there \--

Tomorrow at midnight is your last chance to become an official Launch Donor of Hillary for America.

**[Will you chip in just $1 right now to join other early supporters who’ve had Hillary’s back from the very start?**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjI4MjMxNjcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgxMDU0OTM4S0&mt=2&rj=NTgxMDU0OTM4S0&rt=0)

Launch Donors are critical to putting us in a good financial position before we officially launch on Saturday.

Chipping in just $1 today will help us hit the ground running in the early states and fight back against attacks that will come the minute Hillary takes the stage.

**We 've only got one shot at launching this campaign the right way. Please chip in now to help us prepare for Saturday and the long road ahead: **

[**https://www.hillaryclinton.com/launch-donor/**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjI4MjMxNjcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgxMDU0OTM4S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thank you!

Dennis

Dennis Cheng
National Finance Director
Hillary for America

[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjI4MjMxNjcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgxMDU0OTM4S0&mt=1&rt=0) | | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---

Hillary for America, PO Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjI4MjMxNjcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgxMDU0OTM4S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: URGENT: Rick Scott
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Governor Rick Scott just signed a 24-hour abortion waiting period bill into law. Friend -- A woman's right to choose is just that -- hers. It's certainly not a politician's right. I'm extremely disappointed that Governor Rick Scott just signed into law a bill that implements a 24-hour waiting period for abortions. Politicians like Governor Scott should let women make their own decisions about their own bodies. **I'm more committed than ever to protect a woman's right to choose.** This is an important issue for me, and it's an important issue for my campaign. I'll keep fighting for a woman's right to choose, even in the face of attacks from far-right groups. But I want to know that you stand with me today -- and every day till Election Day. Do you have my back? _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ **[Chip in $5 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida. clean_body: | Governor Rick Scott just signed a 24-hour abortion waiting period bill into law. Friend -- A woman's right to choose is just that -- hers. It's certainly not a politician's right. I'm extremely disappointed that Governor Rick Scott just signed into law a bill that implements a 24-hour waiting period for abortions. Politicians like Governor Scott should let women make their own decisions about their own bodies. I'm more committed than ever to protect a woman's right to choose. This is an important issue for me, and it's an important issue for my campaign. I'll keep fighting for a woman's right to choose, even in the face of attacks from far-right groups. But I want to know that you stand with me today -- and every day till Election Day. Do you have my back? If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. "=" "=" "=" "=" "=" "=" Thanks, Patrick Murphy | "=" | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | ""
